2358090.name: Midnight Heaven
2358090.description:
The Earth has been spotted. Deep space creatures are now marching toward Earth. Your mission, as a pilot of Wardoll, is to fight off legion of alien creatures alone. The mission’s fatality rate is high. Only the fittest will survive. Create a unique build from a variety of items and devices. Gear up by allocating stats. You must be the fittest to survive.

Features

  • Top-down twin-stick arena shooter with roguelite elements.
  • Supports both auto and manual aiming/firing.
  • Choose from a variety of Wardolls, weapons, special abilities, items, and devices to create your unique build.
  • Allocate stat points to gear up any abilities. Customize every ability to your taste.
  • Quick runs. Each run is under 20 minutes, consisting of 3 to 6 stages, each lasting less than 5 minutes.
  • Customizable difficulty. Change the difficulty by modifying enemy health, speed, and spawn amounts.
2358090.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 俄语, 简体中文, 韩语
